# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the build artifact')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVER', defaultValue: '', description: 'Production server address')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = "artifact.zip"
                    sh "wget ${params.ARTIFACT_URL} -O ${artifactFile}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "scp ${artifactFile} user@${params.DEPLOY_SERVER}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    // Additional commands for deploying the artifact, e.g., unzipping and starting the application
                    // sh "ssh user@${params.DEPLOY_SERVER} 'unzip -o ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${artifactFile} -d ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'"
                    // sh "ssh user@${params.DEPLOY_SERVER} 'start-your-application-command'"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()  // Clean workspace after build
        }
    }
}
